Lookalike Audiences
Framework Foundations
Lookalike Audiences
Some important factors when creating Lookalikes:
- Lookalikes can only be created from Custom Audiences, & Page Fans
- Seed audience must be 100 for a country
- Can only build a Lookalike PER country (ie: you can't mash lots of countries together)
- 1% is the closest match to your seed - 10% is the broadest
- Lookalikes created from website custom audiences will dynamically update
themselves every 12 hours
